name: NovaStore
releaseNotes: Completes the legacy NovaStore 0.1.x compatibility guard across every catalog source. Modern clients hide the old com.novastore.client bridge entry from signed indexes, per-app GitHub catalog files, release overlays, and merged results, while the public catalog keeps that same-package bridge available for old installs.
description: NovaStore is Tony's private Android app store for signed APK releases hosted on GitHub. It shows trusted app listings, checks installed versions, verifies catalog signatures plus APK hashes, and hands installs or updates to Android with normal user approval.
